---
title: "CHE 318 Lecture 34"
subtitle: "Final Exam Review Lecture (II)"
author: "Dr. Tian Tian"
date: "2026-04-01"
format:
  html: {}
  revealjs:
    output-file: slides.html
  pdf:
    output-file: L34.pdf
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html" unless-format="revealjs"}

::: {.callout-note}
- Slides 👉  [Open presentation🗒️](./slides.html)
- PDF version of course note  👉 [Open in pdf](./L34.pdf)
:::

:::


## Learning outcome {.center}

This is a review lecture for preparing for the final exam, focusing on
the concept sheets from pre-midterm.

## Cheatsheet for dimensionless number & scalings

![Charts distributed in class. [PDF Version](../L19/public/cheatsheet.pdf)](../L19/public/cheatsheet.svg)

## Cheatsheet for 2-phase mass transfer & adsorption tower

![Charts distributed in class. [PDF Version](../L25/public/cheatsheet-2phase.pdf)](../L25/public/cheatsheet-2phase.svg)

## Cheatsheet for humidification process

![Charts distributed in class. [PDF Version](../L28/public/humidification.pdf)](../L28/public/humidification.svg)

## Cheatsheet for cooling tower

![Charts distributed in class. [PDF Version](../L30/public/cheatsheet-cooling-tower.pdf)](../L30/public/cheatsheet-cooling-tower.svg)
